PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous commands: git working-tree/history destroyers, --no-verify, beads store re-init (bd init --force/--reinit), recursive removes (rm -r/-rf) outside /tmp, and shell-redirect writes to bd-generated tracking mirrors (unless BD_RENDER=1)
Block hand-edits to bd-generated tracking mirrors (docs/workstreams board + per-workstream tracking trio); update bd then run scripts/bd-render-tracking.sh
